expected_reason_codes.non_runtime_notice: These codes are comparison-harness diagnostics only and must not be loaded by runtime selector code.

source_grounding.source_corpus: synthetic RelayOps incident-card corpus supplied in blind authoring package
source_grounding.grounding_note: Only the supplied card IDs and their schema-derived signatures ground this evaluation asset.

acceptance_reason: The typed intake repeats the same operational signal family and therefore violates the published intake validation contract before any candidate comparison may occur.
diagnostic_explanation: This is deliberately malformed only at the typed intake boundary. It proves the harness fails closed before selection rather than de-duplicating or silently accepting invalid evidence.
